meta_title: Free YouTube Image Resizer | Resize to 1280x720 px Online
meta_description: Resize your images instantly to fit YouTube standard sizes. Change size to exact 1280x720 px (16:9) online. 100% private and secure.
subtitle: Scale your photos perfectly for YouTube. Resize to exact 1280x720 px (16:9) instantly with no quality loss.

tool_workspace.description: Upload your file to resize to official YouTube specs. Processed locally in your browser.

how_to.title: How to Resize for YouTube Online
how_to.step1_text: Select your JPG, PNG, or WebP. The file loads in client-side memory instantly.
how_to.step2_text: The width and height fields lock automatically to 1280x720 px.
how_to.step3_text: Choose whether to stretch the image to fit, pad the background, or crop the edges.
how_to.step4_text: Click 'Resize' and download your perfectly scaled YouTube file.

faq.q1: Will my resized image stretch or distort?
faq.a1: No. By using standard aspect ratios and padding options, the resizer keeps your photos perfectly proportioned.
faq.a2: Yes. No files are uploaded to external servers. All operations happen in JavaScript on your device's browser.
